══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 20] FAIL! 30 necrotic damage. HP: 29/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 29/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
